title: GitHub ingestion
goal: Normalize GitHub issues and convert them to TaskSpec objects with authority_source, label mapping, safe defaults, PR exclusion, and deduplication.
implementation_notes: May import schema and PyGithub only.
Duplicate same-family labels: first alphabetical wins, warn.
Unknown labels preserved in raw_labels, never failure-causing.
authority_source = github_event for live, imported_config for the static fixture.
See PHASE0_GITHUB_INGESTION.md for the full mapping and label table.
